title: Create & Harvest
description: A minecraft modpack focused on create and farming
body:
![Modpack's Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db179f1cec979cef69c70140c60a1944ca55a145.png)

Create & Harvest is a Modpack that aims to feel like a farming simulator, with the addition of plenty of farming mods, featuring the **Let's Do Collection, Farmer's Delight & Addons, & Croptopia**

There's also **Create & Addons** to help you with the other side of the modpack: automating some resources like food & building blocks, to help you build a homestead or even a big town!, with the addition of a collection of Decoration Mods like **Macaw's, Refurbished Furniture, Etc.**

Worldgen features a wild combination of mods like **Nature's Spirit, BloomingNature, Biomes O Plenty, Biome Makeover & Frights & Foliage**, all Mixed thanks to **Terrablender & Terralith.**

Some Magic Mods have been featured too since the are themed around nature, especifically **Botania & Hexalia**, & create a plenty of tools thanks to **Hephaestus**

I Have tried to keep the modlist as low as 200 mods, so every mod has been selected carefully to keep a good experience, while the modpack does not feature questlines, It's meant for fun & I believe it can be a cool multiplayer modpack.

Go Farming!
